findings.description: s1 and s2 contain identical content (the 6-step prerequisite list). s2's title 'Java21で使用する場合のセットアップ方法' matches the document title (h1), but the section body is a verbatim duplicate of s1. The source has only one intro paragraph before the first h2 heading; this duplication creates redundancy with no corresponding source structure.
findings.source_evidence: Source intro paragraph appears once before the first h2. Knowledge file has s1 (no title, same list) and s2 (document title, same list) with byte-for-byte identical content.
